creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear maintainer of FreeBSD port audio/amarok-kde4, please take a look at

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=133718

Do you approve/reject this patch?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Sun couldn't care less about Linux other than it now being necessary
in order to be buzzword compliant.
  -- Al Dente
